runtime.startup: Restarted freshness-unknown main stack with npm run compose:down, npm run compose:build, npm run compose:up.
runtime.probe: npm run test:summary:host-network:main passed before browser proof.
runtime.surface: http://localhost:5001/ingest served by the normal main compose stack.

live_api_proof.summary: Live product re-embed calls returned one immediate running request with runId and one queued request with requestId plus queuePosition, and /ingest/roots exposed the queued row with queueState waiting before the queue drained.

browser_proof.route_control_reason: The browser proof mirrors the repository e2e/ingest.spec.ts route-controlled Story 55 UI proof pattern while the normal main compose stack serves the client. This avoids relying on a transient persistent-main-stack queue state for screenshots after the live API proof already showed the real queue admission contract.

console_and_network.known_reload_artifact: One /ingest/models request was aborted by the deliberate page reload between screenshots; the later network capture showed the same endpoint returning 200 OK.

visual_assessment: The queued, running, and cleanup-blocked rows were aligned and readable in the table; disabled queue-blocked actions were visibly consistent, and the details drawer exposed request identity without layout breakage.
